draft.subject: Scaling operations without adding headcount
draft.body:
Hi Derrel,

As VP of Operations, you're probably feeling the tension—more jobs, same crew. Most of the bottleneck isn't in the field; it's in the back office. Scheduling, quotes, follow-up.

We've worked with operations teams to automate the administrative layer so your crew stays in the field and your office handles more volume without hiring.

One VP saw 40% throughput increase in month one. Want to explore what's possible for Mobile Electric Power Solutions?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Addressed VP of Operations role directly, emphasized operations scaling challenges and admin bottlenecks, named the company
